sentences.arabic: رَأَى عَلِيٌّ شَيْئًا يَتَحَرَّكُ تَحْتَ الْأَوْرَاقِ فِي الْحَدِيقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ali je vidio nešto kako se kreće ispod lišća u vrtu.
sentences.translationEn: Ali saw something moving under the leaves in the garden.

sentences.arabic: أَزَاحَ الْأَوْرَاقَ بِرِفْقٍ وَوَجَدَ قُنْفُذًا صَغِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Nježno je odmaknuo lišće i pronašao malog ježa.
sentences.translationEn: He gently moved the leaves and found a small hedgehog.

sentences.arabic: تَرَكَهُ عَلِيٌّ فِي مَكَانِهِ وَلَمْ يُزْعِجْهُ.
sentences.translation: Ali ga je ostavio na svom mjestu i nije ga uznemiravao.
sentences.translationEn: Ali left it in its place and did not disturb it.
